---
title: "Plotting Admixture Data"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
  html_notebook: default
  pdf_document: default
editor_options: 
    chunk_output_type: inline
---
###this document is for running the best k value plot and not the admixture plot itself
## Load libraries
```{r}
library(adegenet)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggforce)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.path = "plots_LD/", dev = c("png", "svg"), dpi=400, cache=TRUE)
```

## Import files
```{r import, cache=T}
labels.df <- read.csv("/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/scripts/PopulationGenetics/labels.csv")

```

## Plot Best K
```{r best-k, fig.height = 5, fig.width = 20, fig.align = "center", cache=TRUE}

K1File <- "/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/scripts/PopulationGenetics/Admixture/logs/Admixture_K1-4020635.out"
K2File <- "/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/scripts/PopulationGenetics/Admixture/logs/Admixture_K2-4020636.out"
K3File <- "/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/scripts/PopulationGenetics/Admixture/logs/Admixture_K3-4020637.out"
K4File <- "/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/scripts/PopulationGenetics/Admixture/logs/Admixture_K4-4020638.out"
K5File <- "/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/scripts/PopulationGenetics/Admixture/logs/Admixture_K5-4020639.out"

cv.values <- c()

cv.value <- grep('CV',readLines(K1File),  value = TRUE) %>% str_split(.,": ", ) %>% last() %>% last()
cv.values <- append(cv.values, cv.value)

cv.value <- grep('CV',readLines(K2File),  value = TRUE) %>% str_split(.,": ", ) %>% last() %>% last()
cv.values <- append(cv.values, cv.value)

cv.value <- grep('CV',readLines(K3File),  value = TRUE) %>% str_split(.,": ", ) %>% last() %>% last()
cv.values <- append(cv.values, cv.value)

cv.value <- grep('CV',readLines(K4File),  value = TRUE) %>% str_split(.,": ", ) %>% last() %>% last()
cv.values <- append(cv.values, cv.value)

cv.value <- grep('CV',readLines(K5File),  value = TRUE) %>% str_split(.,": ", ) %>% last() %>% last()
cv.values <- append(cv.values, cv.value)

cv.df <- data.frame(K = as.numeric(seq(1, 5)), CV = as.numeric(cv.values))

ggplot(cv.df, aes(x=K, y=CV)) +
  geom_point()
```

## K Loop
```{r, fig.height = 5, fig.width = 20, fig.align = "center", eval = FALSE}
for (k in seq(1, 5)) {
  k.table <- read.table(paste0("admixture.", k, ".Q"))
barplot(t(as.matrix(k.table)), names.arg=labels.df[,2], col=funky(10), main=paste0("Filter 100% | Bootstrap 1000 | K=",k),
        xlab="Individuals", ylab="Ancestry", space=0, las=2)
}

```

# K loop - ggplot (numbers for locations + legend + pagination)
```{r ggplot, fig.height = 8, fig.width = 16, fig.align = "center", cache=TRUE}
basePath <- "/scratch/Raccoon_andrea/gabe_trial/analysis/admixture/"

# preferred order (keeps "Unknown")
loc_order <- c("Autauga","Baldwin","Barbour","Blount","Calhoun","Cherokee","Chilton","Clay","Cleburne","Coffee",
  "Colbert","Cullman","Dale","Dallas","DeKalb","Elmore","Etowah","Fayette","Geneva","Houston","Jackson","Jefferson",
  "Lauderdale","Lawrence","Lee","Macon","Madison","Marengo","Marshall","Milton","Mobile","Monroe","Montgomery","Morgan",
  "Pike","Shelby","StClair","Talladega","Tuscaloosa","Unknown")

# clean Location once and lock levels (prevents NA facet)
labels_clean <- labels.df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Location = stringr::str_squish(as.character(Location)),
    Location = dplyr::recode(Location,
      "St Clair" = "StClair",
      "St. Clair" = "StClair",
      "De Kalb" = "DeKalb",
      "Dekalb"  = "DeKalb",
      .default = Location
    ),
    Location = dplyr::if_else(is.na(Location) | Location == "", "Unknown", Location)
  )

loc_levels <- c(loc_order, setdiff(unique(labels_clean$Location), loc_order))
loc_map <- tibble::tibble(LocID = seq_along(loc_levels), Location = loc_levels)

# save a CSV key
dir.create("plots_LD", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
write.csv(loc_map, file.path("plots_LD","admixture_LocID_key.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# pagination layout
n_cols <- 8
n_rows <- 2
per_page <- n_cols * n_rows

for (k in 1:5) {
  Q <- read.table(file.path(basePath, sprintf("admixture.%d.Q", k)), blank.lines.skip = TRUE)
  stopifnot(nrow(Q) == nrow(labels_clean))

  df <- dplyr::bind_cols(labels_clean, Q) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Location = factor(Location, levels = loc_levels),
      LocID    = as.integer(Location),
      # per-location index for x-axis (so no crowded sample labels)
      idx      = ave(seq_len(n()), Location, FUN = seq_along)
    ) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(dplyr::starts_with("V"), names_to = "K", values_to = "value")

  # how many pages of facets?
  pages <- ggforce::n_pages(
    ggplot(df, aes(fill = K, y = value, x = idx)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
      ggforce::facet_wrap_paginate(~ LocID, ncol = n_cols, nrow = n_rows, scales = "free_x")
  )

  for (p in 1:pages) {
    # which LocIDs fall on this page
    from <- (p - 1) * per_page + 1
    to   <- min(p * per_page, nrow(loc_map))
    key_page <- loc_map[from:to, , drop = FALSE]

    plt <- ggplot(df, aes(fill = K, y = value, x = idx)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = funky(10)) +
      ggforce::facet_wrap_paginate(~ LocID, ncol = n_cols, nrow = n_rows,
                                   scales = "free_x", page = p) +
      theme_light() +
      theme(strip.text   = element_text(size = 14, color = "white"),
            axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
            axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks   = element_blank(),
            axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
            axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18),
            plot.title   = element_text(size = 22, hjust = 0.5),
            panel.background = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
      labs(title = paste0("Admixture | K=", k),
           subtitle = paste0("Page ", p, " of ", pages, " — facet labels are LocID (see key below)"),
           x = "Individuals (index within location)", y = "Ancestry")

    print(plt)
    # show the LocID→Location key for this page
    print(ggpubr::ggtexttable(key_page, rows = NULL))
  }
}

```
